Akshay ✦ Pallavi

शुभविवाह सोहळा · २८ एप्रिल २०२६
April 28, 2026 · Nagpur
Scroll

"Brought together by destiny and blessed by family — two hearts united in the sacred bond of marriage, celebrated by all who hold them dear."

कुटुंबाच्या आशीर्वादाने जुळलेले हे पवित्र नाते

आपली प्रेमकहाणी

Our
Love
Story

Brought together by the wisdom of their families, two souls were destined to meet. What began as a beautiful union arranged with love and care blossomed into a lifelong bond.

Blessed by both families, guided by tradition, and celebrated by all who know them — today Akshay and Pallavi begin their most beautiful chapter yet.

कुटुंबाच्या आशीर्वादाने जुळलेले हे नाते —
आता सात जन्मांचा प्रवास सुरू होतो.

01 The Ceremony

विवाह
सोहळा

A celebration rooted in tradition, blossoming into forever. Every ritual a promise, every flame a witness.

प्रत्येक अग्नी एक साक्षी.
